name: Epinephrine (Adrenaline)
description: Endogenous catecholamine tare da aikin alpha da beta adrenergic. Magani na farko don anaphylaxis da kama zuciya. A cikin anaphylaxis, an fi son cinyar IM akan IV (mafi aminci, daidaitaccen inganci). Kada ku jinkirta don samun damar IV a cikin anaphylaxis.
dose: Anaphylaxis: 0.3-0.5 mg IM (cinyar gaba) | Mai allura ta atomatik 0.3 MG IM. Maimaita q5-15 min PRN. Kamewar zuciya: 1 mg IV/IO q3-5 min yayin CPR. Mai tsanani bronchospasm: 0.3 MG IM.
window: A cikin anaphylaxis: ba da IM nan da nan -- kar a jinkirta samun damar IV.
contraindications: Babu cikakken contraindications a cikin gaggawa mai barazanar rai
warnings: Ya kamata a yi amfani da epinephrine na IV don anaphylaxis kawai a cikin kamawar zuciya ko girgiza mai zurfi - mai haɗari idan aka ba da turawa IV ga mara lafiya mai hankali.
Extravasation yana haifar da necrosis na nama - tabbatar da patency na IV.
Yana ƙara buƙatar iskar oxygen na zuciya -- yi amfani da taka tsantsan a sanannen cututtukan jini na waje kama.

pediatric.dose: Anaphylaxis: 0.01 mg/kg IM (max 0.5 mg). EpiPen Jr (0.15 MG) don 15-30 kg. Kamewar zuciya: 0.01 mg/kg IV/IO q3-5 min.
pediatric.note: Yi amfani da kashi na tushen nauyi. Broselow kaset an ba da shawarar.

obstetric.note: Yi amfani da daidaitaccen alluran anaphylaxis -- rayuwar mahaifiyar ita ce mafi mahimmanci. Epinephrine yana da lafiya a cikin ciki don abubuwan gaggawa masu barazana ga rayuwa.
